title: fix(deps): update module github.com/godbus/dbus/v5 to v5.2.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/godbus/dbus/v5](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus) | `v5.1.1-0.20241109141217-c266b19b28e9` -> `v5.2.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fgodbus%2fdbus%2fv5/v5.2.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fgodbus%2fdbus%2fv5/v5.1.1-0.20241109141217-c266b19b28e9/v5.2.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>godbus/dbus (github.com/godbus/dbus/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.2.0`](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/releases/tag/v5.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/compare/v5.1.0...v5.2.0)

#### What's Changed

- Fix default golangci-lint warnings, add it to GHA by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​308](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/308)
- Add example for grab media keys. by [@​linuxerwang](https://redirect.github.com/linuxerwang) in [#​316](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/316)
- CI: enable more linters by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​319](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/319)
- Add rpic to projects using godbus by [@​stephenhu](https://redirect.github.com/stephenhu) in [#​320](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/320)
- CI: Go 1.18 fixes by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​322](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/322)
- add fuzz test for (signature) decoding by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​323](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/323)
- style: error should be returned as the last argument by [@​liaohanqin](https://redirect.github.com/liaohanqin) in [#​314](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/314)
- examples: Add asynchronous D-Bus call example in [#​325](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/325)
- doc: fix spelling errors by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​335](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/335)
- Replace loop with call to copy() by [@​liaohanqin](https://redirect.github.com/liaohanqin) in [#​334](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/334)
- fix(ci): apt-get update before installing dbus by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​342](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/342)
- freebsd: Remove the cgo dependency from transport\_unixcred\_freebsd.go by [@​dfr](https://redirect.github.com/dfr) in [#​332](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/332)
- Reduce allocs in decode function by [@​marselester](https://redirect.github.com/marselester) in [#​344](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/344)
- Set argument of SetProperty to Variant by [@​WhyNotHugo](https://redirect.github.com/WhyNotHugo) in [#​239](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/239)
- Reduce allocs in ReadMessage (unix transport) by [@​marselester](https://redirect.github.com/marselester) in [#​347](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/347)
- Fix missing alignment in decodeU() by [@​felixonmars](https://redirect.github.com/felixonmars) in [#​348](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/348)
- Add test case for bool alignment by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​349](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/349)
- Add go 1.19 support by [@​amenzhinsky](https://redirect.github.com/amenzhinsky) in [#​339](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/339)
- CI tweaks by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​360](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/360)
- ci: add FreBSD job using Cirrus by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​361](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/361)
- Reduce decoder allocs due to int/uint decoding by [@​marselester](https://redirect.github.com/marselester) in [#​356](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/356)
- Pointer semantics in depthCounter by [@​marselester](https://redirect.github.com/marselester) in [#​352](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/352)
- message: use Discard for encoding in IsValid by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​362](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/362)
- Omit extra (\*Message).IsValid for outgoing messages by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​363](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/363)
- Only check header validity when decoding messages by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​364](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/364)
- Replaced godoc url with pkg.go.dev url for v5. by [@​olivercalder](https://redirect.github.com/olivercalder) in [#​369](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/369)
- Reduce bytes to strings allocs in decoder by [@​marselester](https://redirect.github.com/marselester) in [#​367](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/367)
- feat: add security-policy to project by [@​diogoteles08](https://redirect.github.com/diogoteles08) in [#​366](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/366)
- auth: Do not send UID with external auth by [@​idleroamer](https://redirect.github.com/idleroamer) in [#​346](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/346)
- Bump CI versions by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​392](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/392)
- export struct members for signature benchmark by [@​mischief](https://redirect.github.com/mischief) in [#​390](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/390)
- introspect: add Peer to introspection by [@​mischief](https://redirect.github.com/mischief) in [#​389](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/389)
- Bump golang.org/x/sys to v0.27.0 by [@​lucacome](https://redirect.github.com/lucacome) in [#​386](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/386)
- conn: generate error reply in more cases when trying to send invalid … by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​397](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/397)
- CI: bump FreeBSD image to 14.2 by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​416](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/416)
- Modernize code by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​412](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/412)
- Add Sting() method to RequestNameReply and ReleaseNameReply. by [@​istvan-andrasi](https://redirect.github.com/istvan-andrasi) in [#​398](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/398)
- fix: added socket closing to prevent resource leak by [@​aiburegit](https://redirect.github.com/aiburegit) in [#​402](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/402)
- Fix mixed-up names in function documentation by [@​WhyNotHugo](https://redirect.github.com/WhyNotHugo) in [#​407](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/407)
- Unix conn by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​417](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/417)
- add support for struct entities in `MakeVariant` by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​391](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/391)
- Removing sha1 by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​418](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/418)
- auth: disable sha1 by default on non-windows by [@​xnox](https://redirect.github.com/xnox) in [#​413](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/413)

#### New Contributors

- [@​linuxerwang](https://redirect.github.com/linuxerwang) made their first contribution in [#​316](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/316)
- [@​stephenhu](https://redirect.github.com/stephenhu) made their first contribution in [#​320](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/320)
- [@​dfr](https://redirect.github.com/dfr) made their first contribution in [#​332](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/332)
- [@​marselester](https://redirect.github.com/marselester) made their first contribution in [#​344](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/344)
- [@​WhyNotHugo](https://redirect.github.com/WhyNotHugo) made their first contribution in [#​239](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/239)
- [@​felixonmars](https://redirect.github.com/felixonmars) made their first contribution in [#​348](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/348)
- [@​olivercalder](https://redirect.github.com/olivercalder) made their first contribution in [#​369](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/369)
- [@​diogoteles08](https://redirect.github.com/diogoteles08) made their first contribution in [#​366](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/366)
- [@​lucacome](https://redirect.github.com/lucacome) made their first contribution in [#​386](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/386)
- [@​istvan-andrasi](https://redirect.github.com/istvan-andrasi) made their first contribution in [#​398](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/398)
- [@​aiburegit](https://redirect.github.com/aiburegit) made their first contribution in [#​402](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/402)
- [@​xnox](https://redirect.github.com/xnox) made their first contribution in [#​413](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/413)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/godbus/dbus/compare/v5.1.0...v5.2.0>

</details>
